description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a bright red exterior, heavily weathered with patches of dark rust and wear. The surface is glossy in some areas but marred by significant corrosion, giving it an industrial, aged appearance. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement rings, dividing its body into three sections. One side displays a faint hazardous material symbol, suggesting it may have been used for storing chemicals or flammable substances. The top and bottom are both flat and sealed, with no visible openings or handles. Its robust construction and size indicate it is designed for heavy-duty use, likely in outdoor or industrial urban environments.
description: A large, weathered red metal barrel with rust patches, horizontal reinforcement rings, and a faint hazardous symbol, typical of industrial or outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing a mostly red, rusted surface with no visible markings or symbols.
description_view_1: Side view with a visible hazardous material symbol and pronounced rust patches.
description_view_2: Rear view with a continuous red surface and heavy rust, no visible markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a red, rusted surface and no visible symbols or labels.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom thirds
